palette: Jacaranda purple, weathered concrete grey, tarnished brass, and deep leafy green.
lighting: Dappled afternoon sunlight filtering through tree canopies, creating sharp high-contrast shadows on textured surfaces.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture from a low-angle street level in Roma Norte, Mexico City. Looking through a fallen purple jacaranda blossom on a cracked, weathered concrete sidewalk. In the blurred background, a street vendor's colorful metal cart is visible. High contrast lighting, dappled sun shadows. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.

The camera is inches away from the rusted texture of the iron. Below, the dark green leaves of a monstera plant catch a sliver of bright afternoon sun. Atmospheric haze, deep shadows. First-person perspective (FPP) optic sensor capture from inside a small, dimly lit cafe. The camera is resting on a coarse wooden table next to a ceramic cup of dark coffee. A single ray of sunlight hits the steam rising from the cup, illuminating the dust motes in the air. In the background, the blurred texture of a colonial-era stone wall. Muted tones with a pop of bright light. World is impossibly large. You are the camera, do not render yourself. No text or overlays.
